title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (18) UNDER "N. CAPIZ," SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6529 / 53 OG No. 21, 7619 (November 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1984, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (18) UNDER "N. CAPIZ," SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (18) under "

n

. Capiz," section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"18. Centro Barrio School Building, Dao

Construction P5.000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
